lineage.Process: ExportFeatures main.hexgrid C:\repositories\research\arctic_notebooks\dash\SVA\11_Dangerous_infrastructure\dangerous_infra_grid.shp # NOT_USE_ALIAS "hex_id "hex_id" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,main.hexgrid,hex_id,-1,-1;n_points "n_points" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,main.hexgrid,n_points,-1,-1;occ_concentration "occ_concentration" true true false 8 Double 8 38,First,#,main.hexgrid,occ_concentration,-1,-1" #
